# Kbd

Marks a keyboard key or shortcut.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/kbd
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="kbd" example={0} code={`<Kbd>Esc</Kbd>`} />

```tsx
<Kbd>Esc</Kbd>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="kbd"
  example={1}
  code={`<Text>Press <Kbd>⌘</Kbd> <Kbd>K</Kbd> to open search.</Text>`}
/>

```tsx
<Text>
  Press <Kbd>⌘</Kbd> <Kbd>K</Kbd> to open search.
</Text>
```

<ComponentPreview slug="kbd" example={2} code={`<Kbd size="lg">Enter</Kbd>`} />

```tsx
<Kbd size="lg">Enter</Kbd>
```

## Props

| Prop   | Type      | Required | Default | Description |
| ------ | --------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `size` | `KbdSize` | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant | Values           |
| ------- | ---------------- |
| `size`  | `sm`, `md`, `lg` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/kbd.json`
- Recipe: `kbd`
- Files: `src/components/ui/kbd.tsx`
